name: FortiGate Anomaly Detected
description: Detects anomaly events reported by a FortiGate firewall. This rule focuses on the core anomaly event and enriches it with GeoIP data within Sigma, if supported by the backend.

prompts.prompt: A security anomaly has been detected by a FortiGate firewall. This indicates unusual or potentially malicious network activity. Event Details: **Timestamp** {timestamp}, **Source Address** {source_address}, **Destination Address** {destination_address}, **Anomaly Type** {attack}, **Log ID** {log_id}, **Virtual Domain (VDOM)** {vdom}, **User** {user}, **Policy ID** {policyid}, **Session ID** {sessionid}, **Protocol** {proto}, **Source Port** {srcport}, **Destination Port** {dstport}, **Source Country** {source_country}, **Destination Country** {destination_country}. Investigate this anomaly to determine its nature and potential impact.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the anomaly event.

parameters.name: source_address
parameters.description: The source IP address involved in the anomaly.

parameters.name: destination_address
parameters.description: The destination IP address involved in the anomaly.

parameters.name: attack
parameters.description: The specific type of attack or anomaly detected (e.g., 'port_scan', 'brute_force').

parameters.name: log_id
parameters.description: The FortiGate log ID for the event.

parameters.name: vdom
parameters.description: The Virtual Domain (VDOM) where the anomaly was detected.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user associated with the anomaly, if applicable.

parameters.name: policyid
parameters.description: The firewall policy ID related to the anomalous traffic.

parameters.name: sessionid
parameters.description: The session ID associated with the anomaly.

parameters.name: proto
parameters.description: The network protocol involved (e.g., TCP, UDP, ICMP).

parameters.name: srcport
parameters.description: The source port of the anomalous traffic.

parameters.name: dstport
parameters.description: The destination port of the anomalous traffic.

parameters.name: source_country
parameters.description: The country of origin for the source IP (enriched via GeoIP).

parameters.name: destination_country
parameters.description: The country of the destination IP (enriched via GeoIP).
